```python
def p(g):
    H = len(g)
    W = len(g[0])
    # find line color L (first full row of non-zero)
    L = next(row[0] for row in g if all(x == row[0] for x in row) and row[0])
    # find period P between full L rows
    full = [i for i, row in enumerate(g) if all(x == L for x in row)]
    P = full[1] - full[0]
    # collect coordinates of all non-L, non-zero pixels
    pts = [(r, c) for r in range(H) for c in range(W) if g[r][c] not in (0, L)]
    if not pts:
        return [[0] * 3 for _ in range(3)]
    r0 = min(r for r, _ in pts)
    c0 = min(c for _, c in pts)
    out = [[0] * 3 for _ in range(3)]
    for i in range(3):
        r1 = r0 + i * P
        r2 = r0 + (i + 1) * P
        for j in range(3):
            c1 = c0 + j * P
            c2 = c0 + (j + 1) * P
            vals = [g[r1][c1], g[r1][c2], g[r2][c1], g[r2][c2]]
            if len(set(vals)) == 1 and vals[0] != L:
                out[i][j] = vals[0]
    return out
```

```python
def p(g):
    H = len(g)
    W = len(g[0])
    # find a line row without zero
    L = next(row[0] for row in g if all(x != 0 for x in row))
    line_rows = [r for r in range(H) if all(x != 0 for x in g[r])]
    P = line_rows[1] - line_rows[0]
    active_r = [r for r in line_rows if any(x not in (0, L) for x in g[r])]
    if not active_r:
        return [[0]*3 for _ in range(3)]
    r0 = min(active_r)
    r1 = max(active_r)
    # line columns
    line_cols = [c for c in range(W) if all(g[r][c] != 0 for r in range(H))]
    active_c = [c for c in line_cols if any(g[r][c] not in (0, L) for r in range(H))]
    c0 = min(active_c)
    c1 = max(active_c)
    out = [[0]*3 for _ in range(3)]
    for i in range(3):
        rA = r0 + i*P
        rB = r0 + (i+1)*P
        for j in range(3):
            cA = c0 + j*P
            cB = c0 + (j+1)*P
            vals = [g[rA][cA], g[rA][cB], g[rB][cA], g[rB][cB]]
            s = set(vals)
            if len(s) == 1 and L not in s:
                out[i][j] = vals[0]
    return out
```
